issues.title: Summer 2026: Real-Time Latency & Linguistic Architectures
issues.subtitle: Summer 2026: Real-Time Latency & Linguistic Architectures
issues.description: A broadsheet exploring real-time generative AI installations, the archive crisis of live digital art, and the comparative linguistics of computational aesthetics.
